problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
hypothesis: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Monoclonal. Monoclonal antibody blocking protein-protein interaction directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 22 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
